meaning: adj.亲密的,隐私的vt.宣布,明白表示n.熟友
examples: He wrote about the intimate details of his family life.
He went on to intimate that he was indeed contemplating a shake-up of the company.
The cafe has an intimate but buzzy atmosphere.
If the weather is fair, request a table under magnolia trees in the intimate outdoor garden.
Far from encountering resistance as she ventured into people's intimate space, Kern says she made many friends.
